column1: Hey Olivia, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Wordd yea thats where I'll be too
how many ppl in your group?
A bit up in the air but ill say 6
you all from the same school?
nahh thats wassup I went to Salve lol. small world
gonna put this info together for you rn, will hook it up with a deal. how soon were you lookin to get started?
Oh that's sick i have some friends at salve, and as soon as we can
yea Newport is goated. and aight cool lets get you going
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
perf. I can hook it up with a discount on the prices you see there too. just lmk which one we wanna do. ill personally be on the occidental punta cana package your week
heyy Olivia whats up, how we feelin about the options?
sup! hows things going on your end with break?
hi sorry i have a lot going on right now so spring break isn't the priority at the moment hopefully i'll get around to it during break
I hear ya, all good. lets sync back up during break. pricing should be the same but i'll let you know if I see pricing going up before then
sup Olivia hope break went smoothly! We get to talk over plans for spring break?
yes we like the 4 night Occidental
coool good choice, i love it there
when were you guys lookin to get things reserved?
lmk if anyone has any questions, and i can get you guys a reservation started, get everything rolling
Okay there's gonna be 3 of us we are ready to book
bet! I'll send over the reservation in a sec
just emailed it, but here it is as well https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/share/XSZE195LAS
heyy checkin in, how we lookin with things?
not so hot, unfortunately one of the girls just dropped from the trip sorry for making this so difficult for you
all good. is it just gonna be two of you now?
hey checkin in. did you need more time to get things situated
we are tyring to find a 3rd person
heyy checkin in did y'all find a 3rd person yet? We could also start with you two for now, and add a 3rd whenever!
heyy checkin in did y'all find a 3rd person yet? We could also start with you two for now, and add a 3rd whenever!
sup Liv, any luck finding a third?
it looks like it's going to be just the 2 of us
ok cool no worries, did we want to get things secured for both of you?
towards the end of next week we can try and get it secured
heyy checkin in, did we wanna get things secured?
sup Olivia! did you guys want to get a reservation started?
yeah, some of our friends booked the reservation for the 13-17 would we be able to do that as well?
yea I got you! still just two of you right
https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/XSZE195LAS here it is! if you need anything adjusted lmk
Liked “yea I got you! still just two of you right”
hey hey you all good getting onto the reservation?
sup Olivia are y'all able to get those deposits in today so we can get things locked in for you
hey any word on what we wanna do? Operations is asking whats up
we are hasty on the price so i think we're gonna hold of for now
got you. we can always do a 4 night instead. its a little cheaper for the 2 person room arrangement
heyy Olivia hope the Holidays were good! did we wanna look at doing the 4 night option?
sup Olivia, any word on what we wanna do?
hey all good, was it the price?
Whats up Olivia! saw you filled out the form on our website again for spring break. Were we lookin to get things booked?
hey were you looking for help with spring break?
yes, those tax returns came in handy lol
did we wan to run back what we had before? Occidental Punta Cana package 4 night
okay bet. how many of you in the group now?
okay bet my b I missed that
15th to 18th would be 3 nights. did you want til the 19th?
okay bet. I'll reactivate your old reservation and get you going. were y'all ready to lock in tonight?
we can get it going tonight
I'll set that up for you this afternoon and send over
Liked “I'll set that up for you this afternoon and send over”
do you remember your log in info from before?
that one still has the old dates
my b thats updated now just refersh
yeaa lmk if you need any help with it
we're trying to make the first payment now and my friend can't reserve the second spot, like it says temporary reserved
that should clear, have her refresh
soo this may be a silly question and i know we've already paid but would it be to late to add a 3rd person to the reservation
potentially, I'll check in with operations and see whats up!
they ready to make the full payment this afternoon?
wouldn't be able to for sure until saturday
word lets look at it saturday then and see what we can do
hey hey, you hear from the 3rd person?
we're gonna keep it to the 2 of us
yoo! were y'all looking to add any party pass tickets to your packages?
nah i think we're all set
hey hey safe travels today see y'all when you get here
